calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for Patricia Thornton (Petitioner).

Ms. Hinshaw stated that the Decedent has not had an account at B of A for decades (letters were in 1997), that all accounts were at Chase, that Ms. Schreiber was on one account and t the other account was in her name, and that Ms. Schreiber ended up with all of the cash. Ms. Hinshaw also stated that Ms. Schreiber was the Decedent's former Wife, that Patricia and Ken are siblings, that there is a condominium, that they don't know the value, that letters of special administration have expired and that the administrator needs to go to Chase Bank to look for a safe deposit box. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $10,000.00.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Continued To Dec-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
